violations.text: A dead rodent was observed in a trap at the back door. Dead rodents/pest to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
A small gap/hole was observed in the back storage area near the candy section. Gap to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

A small accumulation of rodent droppings were observed in various areas in the back storage area. Pallets to be moved and areas to be cleaned. Old food debris was observed under shelving in the retail area. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The walk-in freezer was observed not in good repair. Per PIC, work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The floor in the chip area has an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
